# Retained shipped inputs for maintained-vs-bootstrap formatter parity.
# This corpus is intentionally selective: it only includes shipped inputs that
# the Sarif-hosted formatter currently matches exactly, and grows only when the
# maintained-vs-bootstrap diff is mechanically proven clean.
examples/hello.sarif
examples/const_control_flow.sarif
examples/hello-package
bootstrap/sarif_syntax
bootstrap/sarif_tools
